metadata.purpose: Source URLs the monthly pricing-drift check fetches to detect when 2026 industry pricing has moved beyond our spot-check bands. See scripts/_pricing-drift-check.js.
metadata.notes: Each vertical lists 3-5 representative industry pricing pages. Claude haiku-4-5 reads each, extracts the typical-installed-cost range it cites, and the script compares against the per-vertical calculator-spot-check baseline. Add or replace URLs when sources go stale or paywall.

pinpoints.label: 3-ton 16 SEER central AC, fully installed (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a 3-ton (~36,000 BTU) 16 SEER R-454B central air conditioner including labor, permits, and standard accessories. Average across single-family homes nationwide. Return only a JSON object: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<short quote from the source>"}.

pinpoints.label: 3-ton 16 SEER heat pump, fully installed (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 NATIONAL AVERAGE installed cost RANGE for a 3-ton 16 SEER2 / R-454B residential heat pump including labor, permits, and standard accessories. Anchor to HomeGuide / Forbes / Modernize 2026 national medians ACROSS mid-tier brands (Carrier, Trane, Lennox, Bryant, Goodman, Rheem, Daikin) — NOT a single brand-specific quote. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Full HVAC system AC + furnace 16 SEER / 90 AFUE 4-ton (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 NATIONAL AVERAGE installed cost RANGE for a complete HVAC system replacement: 4-TON (48,000 BTU) 16 SEER2 central AC + 90% AFUE gas furnace, fully installed including ductwork tie-ins, permits, and standard accessories. For an average 2,500-2,700 sqft home requiring 4-ton cooling sizing (NOT 3-ton sizing for smaller homes). Anchor to HomeGuide / Forbes / Modernize 2026 national medians for the 4-ton config across mid-tier brands. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Asphalt 3-tab shingle roof, 2,000 sqft home (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a complete 3-tab asphalt shingle roof replacement on a 2,000 sqft single-family home, including tear-off of one layer, underlayment, and standard accessories. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Architectural shingle roof, 2,000 sqft home (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a complete architectural (dimensional) asphalt shingle roof replacement on a 2,000 sqft home, including tear-off and standard installation. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Metal roof installation, 2,000 sqft home (national avg)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for a complete metal roof replacement (mix of corrugated and standing seam) on a 2,000 sqft home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Uncontested divorce attorney fees (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 attorney fee RANGE for an uncontested divorce in the US. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Chapter 7 bankruptcy attorney fees (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 attorney fee RANGE for a Chapter 7 personal bankruptcy filing. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: ER moderate visit, in-network insured patient OOP (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 TOTAL patient out-of-pocket cost RANGE for a moderate emergency room visit (stitches, fracture treatment, or similar — NOT trauma, NOT just a copay) for someone with in-network commercial insurance. TOTAL patient responsibility across ER copay + facility coinsurance + imaging/labs + deductible portion combined, NOT just the flat ER copay alone. Anchor to KFF / Peterson-KFF / HealthSystemTracker 2026 commercially-insured ER visit OOP medians. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Knee replacement on Medicare patient cost-sharing (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 TOTAL patient cost-sharing RANGE for a complete knee replacement EPISODE OF CARE on traditional Medicare Part A/B WITHOUT Medigap supplemental insurance. TOTAL patient OOP across all services combined: Part A inpatient deductible ($1,676 2026) + Part B 20% coinsurance on surgeon/anesthesia/imaging + skilled nursing facility days 21+ ($209.50/day 2026) + outpatient physical therapy 20% coinsurance + DME. NOT just the Part A deductible alone, NOT outpatient-only knee replacement. Anchor to Medicare.gov / KFF / AHIP 2026 traditional-Medicare-no-Medigap typical-OOP medians. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Local 2BR move under 50 miles (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a local move (under 50 miles) of a 2-bedroom home with no packing service. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Long-distance 3BR cross-country move 1000+ mi (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a long-distance move (1,000+ miles, cross-country) of a 3-bedroom home with partial packing service. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Single-car steel garage door + opener install (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a single-car (9x7) basic steel garage door installed including a new opener. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Double-car insulated steel garage door + opener (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a double-car (16x7) insulated steel garage door installed including a new opener. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Paver patio 400 sqft, moderate complexity, mid-tier (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a 400 sqft paver patio with moderate complexity (curves, edging) using mid-tier interlocking pavers. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Outdoor kitchen premium tier (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a PREMIUM-TIER outdoor kitchen with luxury appliances (high-end grill, refrigerator, sink), extensive masonry/stone work, professional design, and dedicated gas/electric routing. NOT base/mid-tier outdoor kitchens (those run $5K-$25K). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Aluminum seamless gutters 150 lf, 1-story (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for aluminum seamless K-style gutters (5-inch), 150 linear feet, 1-story home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for copper gutters, 80 linear feet, 2-story home, including hidden hangers and downspouts. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Wood privacy fence 150 lf, 6ft, with gate (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a 150-linear-foot wood privacy fence (PT pine), 6 feet tall, including one gate. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a 100-linear-foot vinyl/PVC privacy fence, 6 feet tall, including one gate. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Standard concrete driveway 600 sqft (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a standard concrete driveway, 600 sqft, 4-inch thick. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Stamped concrete patio 400 sqft (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a 400 sqft stamped concrete patio. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: 10 vinyl mid-tier double-hung double-pane Low-E, pocket replacement (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for installing 10 mid-tier vinyl double-hung windows with double-pane Low-E glass via pocket/insert replacement. Brands like Pella 250, Simonton 5500, Milgard Tuscany. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for installing 6 premium fiberglass casement windows with triple-pane glass via full-frame replacement. Brands like Marvin Essential, Marvin Elevate. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Exterior painting 2,000 sqft, mid-range paint (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for an exterior repainting job on a 2,000 sqft home using mid-range paint (Sherwin-Williams SuperPaint / Benjamin Moore Ben tier). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Interior painting 2,500 sqft, premium paint (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for an interior repaint job covering 2,500 sqft of wall area with premium paint (SW Duration / BM Regal Select tier). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Vinyl siding, 1,500 sqft wall area, 1-story (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for vinyl siding installation on a 1,500 sqft wall area, 1-story home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for James Hardie or fiber cement siding installation on 2,000 sqft of wall area on a 2-story home. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: 8 kW mid-tier solar, string inverter, no battery (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE (gross, before federal ITC) for an 8 kW residential solar system with mid-tier panels (Q Cells / LONGi / REC), string inverter, no battery storage. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: 11 kW premium solar with Tesla Powerwall (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 NATIONAL AVERAGE cost RANGE (gross, before federal ITC) for an 11 kW residential solar system with premium panels (SunPower / LG / Panasonic), microinverters, and one Tesla Powerwall 3 battery. Anchor to NREL 2026 benchmark + EnergySage marketplace medians, not high-cost-metro luxury. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Blown-in attic insulation, 1,500 sqft (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for blown-in attic insulation on a 1,500 sqft attic with R-30 to R-49 target. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Closed-cell spray foam in walls, 1,000 sqft (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for closed-cell spray foam insulation in 1,000 sqft of wall area. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Foundation pier installation, moderate scope (6 piers), modern home
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 TOTAL project cost RANGE for foundation pier installation with about 6 piers on a modern (1990+) single-family home. Anchor to MIXED pier types (hydraulic concrete + steel push + helical) national medians per HomeGuide / Forbes / Angi 2026, NOT helical-only or single-type pricing. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Foundation wall stabilization, major scope, mid-century home
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 TOTAL project cost RANGE for MAJOR-SCOPE foundation wall stabilization on a 1960-1989 single-family home — anchor to a comprehensive multi-technique retrofit (carbon fiber straps + steel I-beam braces + helical tiebacks + drainage) per HomeGuide / Forbes / Angi 2026, NOT single-technique carbon-fiber-only pricing. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Foundation crack repair, minor (2 cracks), modern home
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 TOTAL project cost RANGE for repairing 2-3 minor non-structural foundation cracks (epoxy/polyurethane injection) on a modern home. Total project cost across all cracks combined, NOT per-crack pricing. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Panel upgrade 100A to 200A, modern home (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for upgrading an electrical panel from 100-amp to 200-amp service in a modern (post-2000) single-family home. Include permits and inspection. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Whole-house rewire, 2,000 sqft, pre-1970 (knob-and-tube)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a complete whole-house rewire on a 2,000 sqft pre-1970 home with knob-and-tube or aluminum wiring. Includes permits and patch/paint. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Level 2 EV charger installation (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for installing a Level 2 EV charger at a residential garage, including the unit and the dedicated 240V circuit. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Mid-range remodel, average size, quartz, semi-custom, mid appliances (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a mid-range kitchen remodel: average size 100-150 sqft, quartz countertops, semi-custom cabinets, mid-range appliances (KitchenAid/Bosch tier). National average. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Major upscale, large kitchen, custom cabinets, premium appliances (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 NATIONAL AVERAGE cost RANGE (not metro-specific, not luxury-custom) for a Major Upscale tier kitchen remodel — large size 150-200 sqft, custom cabinets, premium appliances (KitchenAid Built-In / Thermador / Wolf / Sub-Zero professional tier). Anchor to Cost vs Value / NKBA / HomeGuide-style national medians. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Cabinet refacing, average size, semi-custom (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a cabinet refacing project on an average-size kitchen with semi-custom finish (no full cabinet replacement). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Brake pads + rotors per axle, standard sedan, independent shop (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical RepairPal/AAA cost RANGE for replacing front brake pads AND rotors per axle on a standard sedan (Camry/Accord-class) at an independent shop. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: Engine replacement, standard sedan, independent shop (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical 2026 cost RANGE for a remanufactured engine replacement on a standard sedan at an independent shop, including labor and the reman engine itself. Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.

pinpoints.label: AGM battery replacement, standard sedan, chain shop (national)
pinpoints.askClaude: Find the typical installed cost RANGE for an AGM battery replacement on a standard modern sedan at a chain shop (Pep Boys / Firestone / Midas). Return only JSON: {"low": <number>, "high": <number>, "sourceQuote": "<quote>"}.
